name: mouse-word-highlight
description: Highlights every occurrence of a word in the scrollbar overview ruler when you select it with the mouse — restores occurrence markers in vscode.dev where the semantic language service runs in partial mode.

mouseWordHighlight.triggerOnMouseOnly.description: Only highlight when a whole word is selected with the mouse. Turn off to also highlight whole-word selections made with the keyboard.

mouseWordHighlight.maxMatches.description: Safety cap on how many occurrences to decorate in very large files.
